title: The Leak
summary: A trust breach exposes Ada's lead, forcing immediate defensive movement and shrinking her safe options.

narrative.newInfo: External actors are actively watching for convergence-related discoveries.
narrative.dripHook: How much time remains before the search is shut down?
narrative.payoffDelivered: Research phase breaks; pursuit phase starts.
narrative.notes: Cadence: pressure pulse. Function: convert knowledge cost into danger. Exit: Ada/Benny move from inquiry to evasion.

rewardTokens.description: Ada shifts from research posture to survival posture.
Truth-seeking now increases risk instead of clarity.
